titleStmt.title: SII 29.71: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 71. (A.R. No. B. 772 of 1962-63.) RAÑJŌLE-KHĒṆI, BIDAR TALUK, BIDAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab kept behind the Hanumān temple.

The slab is broken into three pieces and badly worn out. It belongs to the reign period of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva [Vikramāditya VI]. Then the record gives a long genealogical account of the Sindha family to which mahāmaṇḍlēśvara Bhairavadēva belonged. Bhairavadēva made a gift of lands and money to gods Hemmēśvara and Mailāḷēśvara of Ṟenjeṟu in the name of his parents (tammayyana tammabbēya pesaralu). The gifts were made over to after leaving the feet of ārādhya Davarēśvaradēva [perhaps he was the sthānapati of both the temples].

Also the record has registered gifts of land and money made by the mahājanas and other individuals to the god Hemmēśvara and to the Brahmaṇas of the Brahmapuri of that god and also to Bhāskara who wrote the record. Further, the record states that Jagatsēvya, one of the four sons of Niḍudōḷ-Sindha, the progenitor of the Sindha family, governed Ṟenjeṟu, situated in Aṭṭaḷe-nāḍu. The other three sons viz., Satyasēvya, Prabhusēvya and Budhasēvya administered over Paḷiyaṁda-maṇḍala, Bāgaḍge-dēśa and Baḷḷare-nāḍu respectively. Davarēśa, the receipient of the gifts is stated to be an expert in Vēdic tarka [logic] and vyākaraṇa [grammar] and a muni of Lākuḷa Samaya, with exceedingly high tapaśakti.

The record is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 40, Manmatha, uttarāyaṇa. Though the information is insufficient the cyclic year can be equated with 1115 A.D. [Śaka 1037] which is the 40th year of the Chālukya Vikrama year and the tithi corresponds to December 25, [Saturday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī jaṁjayadhi jagadhi dēśā dēvadātēya kōṭi makuṭarppuṭita (va)tṛnavadyāta vibrājitāṁghriḥ kṣitijaḷa śikhivāta cyāma caṁdrārkkā yajvanu pradita tanurumēśaḥ ssarbba lō
ka kacarttā . Eḷeyaṁ muṁna vanēkarāḷdararvasa ccāḷukyavantā mahītaḷa manāḷpaḷu māḍi kaṟeyavanaṁ kaṭṭiṭṭu kaṭṭanvaya taḷidati tanaga nu mantarisida bhūcakra makāḍi badose
ḷadiṁ ma(tta)magurbbidadēvana cāḷukyaṁ nataṁ tilapa . Āvasudādipaṁ gōdaśaṁ vamuṁntapaṁ sutanānṛpaṁ gōdhātri vinutaṁge saṁda jayasiṁhanṛpa maganātmajātanantāvibhu geydapaṁ puvadadā
pūvamallanavaṁge puṭṭidaṁ bāvipa dhātri vikramane vikramanūrjita bāhuvikrama . ghana bārhāga badigarpita ripunṛpara yuvvadoḷu tūḻdu siṁhāsanamaṁ vaikoṁḍa vīra draviḷa magadha māḷa
bu kāṁbōja rājadi narēṁdra vrātamaṁ sagaradoḷaḷaṟēcaṁ koṁḍa tējaṁ (ścē) sāmānyanē bāppa permma satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ vikramādityadēva . prasasti . sasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ ma
hārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ caḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamānamā caṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ salutta
veyire matta(ṁ) . kaṁ . Eḷeyāḷu migilenisida kuntaḷa viṣayottaṁsa mauni sīphala tāṟadiṁdaṭṭaḷenāḍu viśvanāgaravaḷuṁ bavanāḷka nāḍugaḷu paḍiyāḷave . Ene pogaḷpa pogarttage neleyeni paṭṭaḷa nāḷka tiḷaka
ruṁ sajjanitā sabyaṁṟeṁjēṟu nivāsasyana menisi siṁdānvayada . Āpuradāḷuvaga (kā)ḷaṁ maṇidipaṁ sukhasaṁkatā vinōda doḷirppa bhūva śikhāmaṇi hajjamahipana vaṁśāvatāra mentene peḷvā . śrī mallāra
traya cūḍāmaṇige śivaṁge tāne bhūṣaṇa menipuddā(ma) mahima bhujaṁga śikhāmaṇi dharaṇīṁdra nuragalōkādhīśa . dharaṇēṁdranagrama mahiṣi paramapadakhyāti vaḍeda rtāvati yāḷu naridati
śaya bhōgavati puradoḷu nijarājadhāniyoḷu sakhamidu ka(li)dēva (sakā) dharaṇēṁdra (va)satige gaccha viṁghnaṁgaḷu bittarisida vatiśayamane bittaripantire sakaḷa sakaḷa bhuvana janapuṇya(ṣta)ḷa . taraḷa .
kuḷanagagaḷa sānu naṁdanadoḷu vinōdamanādaluṁ kruḷirvvagaṁge (yō)ma siṁduvanira lōkuḷiyāḍalu beḍagutippa saśāṁka sūryyara nādavatthiye nōḍaluṁ jaḷajavaktravaḷuṁbamāgire garbbadāha
ḷamappa . (du) . dharaṇītaḷake vimānaṁ cerasā daṁpatigaḷāgedu siṁdhukṣiti (yo)ḷu pariva nadi siṁdhu vinoḷātaraṇi jaḷakrīḍayāḍi tadanaṁtaradoḷu . v® . Udayaṁgeyva rkkanaṁ paṁnagapati sati kaṁḍargvyamaṁ ko
ṭṭuniṁnaṁdada kaṁdaṁ vaṁśaratnaṁ janiyisugenagiṁneṁbuduṁ maṁtra sāmartthyada mārttāṁḍa prasādadhārekāḷā taruṇārkkaprabhaṁ naṁdanaṁ puṭṭidanā padmāvatidēvige bhuvana janāścarya sāryya prabhāva .
Antupuṭṭuvadu . kaṁ . dharaṇītaḷadoḷagī vanavatarisidanīdharenosadu pāḷisugeṁdādaradiṁ (na)nasārddūḷigeniravinidaṁ patigaḷattavāpudumitta . mole yūḍidudahisutanaṁ puli siṁdhu
ginaḍiyalārbbakaṁ maṟeyādanāpuliya moleyuṁḍu beḷadaṁ puliṁyuṁ moleyittadavana puṇyōdayadi . v® . Adanāgaḷu kaṁḍu vīrōttamanenipa taḷāṟaṁ baruttaṁ dahicatra lōkakhyāta viprōttama
rggaṟipu(ṭṭhi)duṁśāsa pūmāle kuṁbhaṁ pudidirdduttuṁga . vēdaṣṭannigudipa (di) hiṁtāraṇaṁ raṁjisalu baṁdidirggoṁḍuydaṁ dahi chatradoḷirisi kanatsōdadoḷu vipramukhyama . ka . dharaṇīṁdranoṁḍu paḍamaṁ bareduḍayoḷu
kaṭṭa pādaḍaṁto paṭamaṁnidutaṁ bājisi kaṁdādavadiṁ ta rmmameṁ māḍisidaru . pātāḷa cakravartti vinūtaguṇaṁ bhōgavatige pati dharaṇēṁdraṁ tātaṁ padmāvati tāyi mātanītaṁ mahātmanuttama vaṁśa siṁdhugina
neḷatāḷanu nayadiṁdamivaṁ puliya moreya nuṇutirddhuda siṁdugi manedayaṁ pasariṁda mīva siṁdaneṁdu nuḍidarvvipraru . Ā siśuratna kaṁnaprāśana (bhū)tōpa nayana maṁmāḍisi vāgīśa nīmaneṁbina nānāśā
stragaḷu manarkkaṟiṁ mūvatteraḍaṟa mukta catuṣṭaya pariṇatiyoḷu tāne bhuvana bhuṁbōkaṇada . vacana . Antu samasta śastra śāstra
doḷati paricitanāgirddahi chatradoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamirdda kumārana nōḍi . v® . Anupamayavva nōduyammivaṁga mardattu sīmaṁ lalāṭa lōcana mayūravarmma Npanirddapa nalte kadaṁba vaṁśa
nātana suteyoḷu vivāha manoḷavareva migaḷa pāgivoṁdu mājanapada paḷuduṁ kelabaraydidava banavāsadēśa . ka . badukaḍa banṛpaṁ gavareṁdarṇṇija suteya nosedu lakṣmīmatiyaṁ siṁdha mahīpati mṛdu
ba vahi chatradiṁdavene munida (nṛ)pa . ma ṇijanūkanrā . Āvṛdātana kulaṁ balamāvṛjātaḍepiḷāva naṁbikeyadāvaḷā maṁḍaḷa mā(r)tthadiṁtāmṛda karamonōdileṁtanumaneṁnu maṁgāvilaṁ bayagadaddidaneṁdu mahībhuja . ka .
kaḍumuḷidunosala kaṇṇiṁdaḍale nirīkṣipudu māyitaṁ karataḷavāgadā nimiḍu naṁdāvāyyalu paḍadaṁ niḍu(dā)ḷasidēva guṁrasiṁda . Upēṁdravajra sāmarthyamaṁkadā mayūra varmmaṁtāmāṁbitāgeddi jaggeṁdanāgaḷā sāmānyaṁnyanallā
niḍudoḷa siṁdhanī māta nāgaṁbuda neyde pari . varanū Eṁbuduṁ mavaroḷagabhinava byasanenisidanadācāryyaṁ baḷupātāḷadēvarasaṁ dharaṇīṁdraṁ jatakanaḷpudaṟiṁ pātāḷa cakravarti padmāvatīdēviṣata (dō)hadiṁ paravaṁ ko
ṭṭadappudaṟiṁ padmāvatīlabda varaprasādanuṁ bhōgāvati puramenijanvayi rājadhāniyarppādaṟi bhōgāvati puravarādhīśvaranuṁ Ahichatrapura puravarāmararaṁ rakṣisidana ppudaṟidihachatra puravarāmara rakṣadakṣa dakṣiṇa
bhujā daṁḍanuṁ jagaṁmellaṁ naccimecci pogaḷpudaṟiṁ jagameccigaṁḍanuṁ kanasinalappaḍaṁ paraveṇṇa noḻtadudaṟiṁ paravarū kaṁdanuṁ vidagdha vidvajjanakke bēḍiduda nīvudaṟiṁ vidagdha vidvajjana pārijātanuṁ rājanītiyalu naḍavanappudaṟiṁ rāja māṁdhā
tanuṁ puliya moleyuḍu baḷada nippudaṟiṁ byāghralāṁchananuṁ phaṇīṁdra vaṁśōdbhava nappudaṟi paṇīṁdra kētananuṁ niṁnanosalaṁ kaṇṇunidda(va)riyaṁ nimiddha karataḷaṁ dinaka (divo)ydanappuduṟiṁ niḍudoḷa siṁdhanumeṁba pāsā
rkkaṁ pogadva pogarttādaṁ neleyādanātaṁ ninagaḷiyanāgalu takka neṁbuduṁ mayūravarmmaṁ manadāgoṁdu Ā ya naṭṭi barisi . kaṁ . bhuvana prakhyāta kadaṁba vaṁśa tiḷakaṁ mayūravarṁmmanṛpānōtsavadiṁ nija putriyoḷā
si(ṁ)dhu vivāhaṁ māḍaneṟda lakṣmī matiyoḷu . śrīmatu siṁdānvaya cūḍāmaṇige śrīkadaṁba vaṁśōttama lakṣmīmatigaṁ puṭṭiduruddādu parākramigaḷenipanā lvettaneyaru . Abyāja sauryyara prabhusēbyanumaṁ sa
(tya)sēbyanu manaṁta jagatsēbyanumaṁ paḍedabbudha sēbyanumaṁ cu naṁ buṁbhu karaṁ nātmajara . Ātavanu śastraśāstradadoḷati pravīṇarāgi . Aṁdu taṟisaṁdu nālvaṁṇaṁdana kuṁtarēneyda bāykaḷi savettaṁdadakṣiṇa bhū
migasida rvikramadoḷesagaduṁtarirpparu . Āgaḷu poṟamaṭṭurmanōrāgadi nudavaṁdaraṁdu māḍi(dda)vadōśamaṁ putarkkalaṁ barṇṇagadvaja sahita rivakṣahichatradavaru . Aṁtavarbbara subadu . v® . paḷiyaṁḍakṣiti
maṁḍalarkkarasanādaṁ satyasēbyaṁ dharātaḷadoḷu mēlenisirvva bāgaḍege dēśā dhīśaṁnādaṁ bhujabaḷamataṁ prabhusēbyanalli budasēbyaṁ (tri)puraṁ kādaṁ nākuḷardiṁ baḷatināḍanā®vana sadatitalli siṁdānvaya . ka . Avaroḷage jaga
tsēbyaṁ bhuvana janāścarya(śau)ryyanuṁ siṁdakuḷārṇava mṛgalakṣanu meniputsōvadiṁdesedi(dde) nāḍoḷu . bhuvanottama nenisida siṁdavaṁśa bevarādaneṁbaṁ dahichatrada bhūdivijargge namaśumanayyaṇa
dāyumaṁ koṭṭarā sadubhallāṁkayuma . kalitanadāḷdu caladoḷu bhujabaladoḷu tēja do haṁsadoḷu tatkaladoḷmaṁḍaḷika (kku)nnulanuṁ boppulanumeṁba vī(rārṇṇada)ḻda(du) . Atiśayamāboppala nī
kṣitīśvararppalaru mavaniyaṁ pāḷisaluṁnata mārjjita tējarddugatiyāṁ harakateṁdu meṁba bhūbhu (desedarā) ṁśadoḷudyāta bhujaṁga rbada ta hagaṁ(gha)raṁ negaḻdallamanaṁ tātanatanaya pratāpi badgega bhūpō(ku)la
vaṟoḷalla baddana haṁcalavalu gidaḍaḍaṟu vahita maṁḍa(kkirta)ra tāḷdalamuṁ (baḷpa) varedaṟuṁ tola (sagu)mā ṁ karttānayaru . diṁ kuṁdama(reya)ru camūnādarudu (vritti)ya mēdiniyaṁ
sanamanemagānu tirppuduṁ cakripāḷalu (mā)nidu grāmātisyannaṁgaḷa nā taḷidu kādirkki cāḷukya siṁhasa tāra sa(le) badu
rbbādavanarbbi saloṁdapagaloḷiṟidādinitudi yoḷu goṁkanaṁ (i)ḍa goṁkanṛpa . tava The slab is cut from here and
ne taripaṁ nṛpati sthānanahirāda vaśōdgānaṁ smaratilanatiga
ru . dirājadi nidarī nṛpāḷa tāke nimaggulaṁ mugula muguḻiṁda nalida tama
harjja nripēṁdra citracaritavaṁtidaḍu pariyida kāsalūra
rṇarvvadāharjji mahīpana kāpavahniyiṁ(darudi)
ḍanuṟitā (haḻvida) rāhavadāḷa
rava mada ṟadū
(daṇa vida sukaṁ)

na ma . v® . ĀNpatige tanayaṁ
yu ba ga modalaneya (kkaṁ) tarada hajjanṛpāḷavariseṁba libbaratiśaya sauryya
datage rada Aṁki tāparipālaṁ yanadeneṁbudu daṁkavabuda . baḍabāgniyaṁbudu ha(rjjiba)dēva kalikattala bhūpana
śāleya baratidu janavādibhajanā daṁ padineyya rāṇa(taṁma) ṇiṁga dāddacaḍa rāja mahīṁdra ḷa da gadu gaṁdaṁ tatu śca
sa dinakadu taḷavakkuvakrigaḷu karaguṁ gōviṁdu vaṁda kkārtika bisi bavadaregiḷi (taṁma) viśvakana kāṭṭa pa mahōdayaru hajjamaṁ vapu gālu
(ra) sōpakṣitipa nanibedārbbi hajjakṣitipaṁ bhuvana pra (dā) carasavanipa bihaṁgaḷa tadaneditadranitarpa nicakrakke kaivāvadina vavōlu nibhraluṁ pavapuridā
. ladhika virōdhisuvana japukavadida sāyu mudāva bu patativina tāvadi mahābaḷakirtti samsadika dēvadi nijarājanati vacaṇivara cadiṟāka prā
bba māpanoḷu mādapāḷu neya tāta ṁkadoḷaga (mādhava) lāde kadana prāṁgaṇadoḷaṁ pādaṁ pe danya vaggadināta suralōka nagaṇa tam is written above the line.
ti gōji vaṇalāni jaḍa haḷudiyā na bhū menisida Amara kīrti sthāna yara dāḷa
timāhita divya di pati ti śivālaya manija nāmadi nṛpā . va . ji viradāda dharmmadoḷana
(hanaga) ḷu najita samasta vādiprabhāva niḷu (varti) ru . Ā ḷa ga
gōddūma
daḷaśvara
writing-very badly damaged

effaced
na śaramanadaṁ dāḷa bhavara jitā
da kavirāja geyyuṁ tāmale . ka . paramapita hajja
mastaka hālarādi karbi dēva
kāraka
madara
effaced
cāḷukya vikrama varṣada 40 neya (manmatha saṁva)tsarada Uttarāyaṇa
mataru 100 Ātavi
śrī bhīmēśvara (dēvarge)
māyaṇana gadde hadike mattaru 100 baṁmadē mūḍalu (haḍapada)
davariṁ paḍuvalu hāḷi 2 Ā kūḍa yiṁ baḍagalu tōṭiṁ hiriya baḷi kāvalu tōṁṭa 1 gadā biṭṭa ya hērige hā 1 Aḍake 10
ge meḷasu (soṁ)ḍaḷa 1 Iṁgu modalāgi (tūguva) bhaḍa kkarhargge 2 Ādiyalu dalu ke pūmāle śakti hari lakṣigaṁ saṁta marādi
bīga nagaḻtidda jayaṁtanāda (naṁtira kāṁta) padma bhūpatige poḷaladēvige nā duruva bhū bhujā divākara siṁdha rājēṁdra dadināvaga kōḷmanana
rgvai maṇi vairiyida haraṇa sadamadoṁbu vida gadgaja moppuva ma dīkṣāḷina (jō) mādagra tēja nī . bṛṁda bhōga viśuddha satyanavanibhā maṁtāgi nalabareṇegīśvara ni
śubha gādya prabhu sōpayya . lōttanenaleppu da . jāya (po) nṛpaṁ bhairava . kaḍugali bhairava tipanāta bhūpaṁ khaḍadi
siḍilu (duraḻda) mūdareyā ṁdā garaṇa raṁga madaccari yā yu karā biḍḍa haya
ḷatāḍi bappa ttara pāna sūsiṟida sāra tadu kalpa bhaṭa (ḷi sūvisa diva kaḍu) loka yiṟidu geldāraṇaṁ jagaduccagaṁḍana(ṁ) . ka . pemmāḍi nṛpatigamige taṁma
śiva grahaṁgaḷa māḍisida (bo)mmēśvara ma(bbhō)ra vanoṁ(ve)ṁdalu dammoḷa lēśaṁ ramyanatuḷa (rājyaṁ) geyyuttamire bharaṇaru śiṣyalākuḷa samayyaṁta ratna dīpaka nesadaṁ lōkake vaidikatarka vyāka
(ra)ṇa ga(mu)nidava rēśamunīśa . parasamayavādi vādīvara gaṁgūrjjita ḷanu nakhiḷa bhuvanādhīśaṁ . tapadādavana ga panaṁkritā yādavōjagatrayyuka karuṇa
bhuviṇada vikṣa karṣaṇa vapuvanala vadatēja munīkritkāṁta jagadoḷu . grāma(lō) kābharaṇa prabhuparamārāruṁ jāgratraya śantumēśa cariteṁdunu municaritaṁ nīḍutaṁ tanagennedale śeyedhipati nna . praśasti . svasti samasta guṇasā
(dha)na vaḍḍu madārādhyarenisidavarēśvaradēvara kālaṁkarcci śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara bhairavadēvara sa hemmēśvara mailāḷēśvara vāḷutaṁmayyana tammabbeya pesaralu tānettisida dharmakke biṭṭa bhūmi hajāvaligeyalu U
E mūḍalu śrī hoṁmmēśvara dēvargge mattaru 40 Adakke sīme kkalu (ā mēreya) barddu haḍavalu gaṁgeviya ḍḍi baḍagalu neṭṭa kallu mūḍalu haḍiyaṇa raṁjemēre . śrī mailāḷēśvara (mēre)yiṁ baḍagalu mattaru 60 A
radakke sīme teṁkalu hoṁmmēśvara bhūmiyanaṭṭa kalluṁ paḍuvalu sitarigiya ṭṭa baḍagalu mūliga ga(yi) būdayana reṁjamēre . mattaṁ śrī hajjēśvara dēvarge A bhūmiyiṁ baḍagalu mūlina nācarasana sthaḷa mattaru 30 mūli
gara ka rasana mūligagāya mūvatteraḍaṟa Aruvaṇasa sābeḍaṁṇaḷa Āyadvāyaṁ naṁdiya kayyoḷage cavaḍābana maga cāmēyana Aṁśagoḷagāduttama krayagoṁḍa mattaru 15 banadi mūḍalu naṁdādī
vigeya bōga (kkettuva) mattaru 1(0 Alliṁ) baḍagalu śrī hoṁmēśvaradēvara nivēdyakke puṇisayya koṭṭa 1 (tāḍa) tōṭa 1 Aṁtami tumaṁ koṭṭidale mattaṁ śrīkhaṁḍakke Ā martya drāmukha karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ prajegaḷuṁ reṁjēṟalu koṭṭa gadyā
ṇa 2 haḷḷikhēraḍa dāśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷu koṭṭa tōṭa 1 ṟekallalu maijagāvaṁdana madavaḷu khābikājjaṁgāṁvaḍi koṭṭa tōṭa 1 haḍiya hajjarasanamaga vīraheṁmāḍi yarasaṁ sirisigeyalula koṭṭiya hānoḷa
ggyaṁ Agrahāra sirisigeya Ā śrī heṁmmēśvaradēvara śrīkhaṁḍake biṭṭa ga haṇa 2 śrī heṁmēśvaradēvara brahmapuriya brāhmaṇarge ṟeṁjēṟa (ko)ṭigeya Eḍavāladalu matta 60 śāsanava bareda bhāskaraṁge matta 5
Anitarkke biṇḍōrake(la)gāravarge yī paḍuvalu maṁgaligegeya ṟeṁjēṟa holavadu baḍagalu haḷḷa mellēralu naṭṭa kallugaḷu mēru . śrī dattāka . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu nṛpāṇaṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sarbbānētān
bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdra . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādhibhi yasya yasya (ya)dā bhūvi tasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . vidyādi viśvatōyaṣuḥ śuḥka kōṭara vāsīna kairṇisa
rppā bhārjayāṁ daṁḍava(śō) gāparharēṇāṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭivarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē [krimiḥ .] ggatsudā (nā) vanorbbaṁ rakṣisuvaṁge samasta bramavīyaṁ savarṇṇanāmaLetter nA is written above the line.
(davī) brāhmaṇargge dāna goṭṭa paḷmaḍi danaḷidavaṁge (brā)tuviya brāhmaṇa kṛta pāpanalu maṁ vāraṇāsi prayāga (agvyu) tīrttha kurukṣētradalu koṁda dōṣaṁ sārgge . śrī śrī śrī śrī
